top_signals.title: Yen Holds Near 160 Against Dollar After BOJ’s Ueda Hints at Hike
top_signals.summary: The yen remained near the 160 level versus the dollar following remarks by Bank of Japan Governor Kazuo Ueda that make an interest rate hike this month sound likely but not certain.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Eli Lilly's top dealmaker says don't be surprised to see more M&A that pushes Lilly into new areas
top_signals.summary: Eli Lilly's new top dealmaker explains how the company changed its approach to M&A now that it's the most valuable pharmaceutical company in the world.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Betfair to be probed in court over online betting liability
top_signals.summary: Betfair is due to be scrutinised in court tomorrow over its duty of care in relation to the dangers of online gambling and betting following a problem gambler’s suicide.  The online gambling giant, owned by Irish-American betting giant owned by Flutter Entertainment, will face questions over claims it failed to identify Luke Ashton’s gambling addiction [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Mortgage rates are easing slightly, but homebuyers are retreating
top_signals.summary: Mortgage rates fell slightly last week, but neither current homeowners nor potential homebuyers were inspired. Demand for mortgages fell overall.

top_signals.title: Apparent Zcash outage was a block explorer problem, infrastructure providers say
Suralink Unveils Industry’s Most Comprehensive Agentic AI Platform, Launches Microsoft Copilot & Claude Integrations
top_signals.summary: With the introductions of Suralink Agent Library, Cloud Testing Suite, Workpaper Suite Intelligence, and native integrations with Microsoft Copilot and Anthropic’s Claude, Suralink continues to demonstrate it is the industry leader enabling accounting firms and their clients to harness the power of Agentic AI, address the Rework Cycle, and close the Client Readiness Gap.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
